PART I CLASSES

entities.name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn

data.description: Starting 2nd level, you can use Channel Divinity as an action to banish darkness by harnessing sunlight and radiant energy. As a bonus action, you radiate light in a 30-foot radius from yourself, dispelling all magical darkness within that area. Additionally, each hostile creature within the radius must make a Constitution saving throw or take radiant damage.
Domain spells, features, and other aspects related to the Nature domain.
Starting at 8th level, the spell slot you create is one level higher than normal.

Starting 17th level, you can use an action to activate a sunlight aura that lasts for 1 minute or until you dismiss it using another action. You emit light in a radius of 60 feet and bright light in a radius of 30 feet beyond that. Enemies in bright light have disadvantage on saving throws.
